title: Can NVIDIA Partnership Help IREN Reach $3.7B AI Cloud ARR Target?
text:
IREN Limited secured a major partnership with NVIDIA, signing a $3.4 billion, five-year AI cloud contract to deploy Blackwell GPUs. This agreement is expected to contribute approximately $700 million in annual recurring revenues.

The company exited Q3 fiscal 2026 with $3.1 billion in ARR under contract and maintained its goal of reaching $3.7 billion by year-end 2026. Growth is anticipated to accelerate in the second half of 2026 as additional GPU capacity becomes operational.

To support expansion, IREN plans to deploy 480 megawatts of AI cloud capacity with 150,000 GPUs by the end of 2026. The company is converting existing Bitcoin mining facilities in Texas and British Columbia into AI cloud infrastructure.

However, analyst sentiment is cautious—IREN carries a Zacks Rank #4 (Sell) rating and trades at a forward price-to-sales ratio of 6.99X, significantly above the industry average of 3.0X, suggesting overvaluation despite strong revenue growth prospects.
